CREATE TABLE Users (UserID INT PRIMARY KEY, UserName VARCHAR(255), UserOption VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO Users (UserID, UserName, UserOption) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 'Option1');
INSERT INTO Users (UserID, UserName, UserOption) VALUES (2, 'Bob', 'Option2');
UPDATE Users SET UserOption = 'NewOption1' WHERE UserID = 1;
UPDATE Users SET UserOption = 'NewOption2' WHERE UserID = (SELECT UserID FROM Users WHERE UserName = 'Bob');
UPDATE Users SET UserOption = (SELECT 'DynamicOption' FROM (SELECT 'DynamicOption' AS UserOption) AS tmp) WHERE UserID = 2;
DELETE FROM Users WHERE UserID IN (SELECT UserID FROM Users WHERE UserOption = 'Option1');
SELECT UserID, UserName, UserOption FROM Users WHERE UserOption IN ('Option2', (SELECT UserOption FROM Users WHERE UserName = 'Alice'));
SELECT DISTINCT UserOption FROM Users WHERE UserID <> (SELECT UserID FROM Users WHERE UserName = 'Bob');
ALTER TABLE Users ADD COLUMN LastUpdated TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
UPDATE Users SET LastUpdated = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE UserID = 1;
SELECT UserName, COUNT(*) FROM Users GROUP BY UserName HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
